analysis:
Based on your framework analysis:

**Best CSP:** PLTR $120 strike, 2026-06-18, 42 DTE, $3.20/$3.30, delta 0.23, 23.5% annualized return

**Best CC:** GOOGL $405 strike, 2026-05-22, 15 DTE, $7.20/$7.40, delta 0.40, 44.8% annualized return (existing position)

**Best LEAPS:** MSFT $195 strike, 2028-01-21, 624 DTE, $228.00/$232.50, delta 0.99, 1.8x leverage (but recommend waiting for trend stabilization)

**IVP Environment:** Mixed volatility - tech names showing elevated IVP (PLTR 81%, MSFT 91%, NFLX 85%) creating premium opportunities, while mega-caps near highs have lower but still workable IVP levels.

Note: All LEAPS candidates are either extended above MA50 or in unstable downtrends, suggesting patience for better entry points despite attractive option pricing.
